output.reasoning: The passage uses formal instructional language and explicitly specifies an output format, which is characteristic of AI-generated or AI-oriented prompt text. Its wording is generic and context-independent, so it is more likely AI-generated.

The passage uses concise, domain-specific documentation language and contains a distinctive idiomatic phrase (“pray, do not assign it”), suggesting it is more likely adapted from human-written technical documentation than generated by AI.

The passage uses simple instructional language and contains a small subject–verb agreement error (“coordinates ... has”), which is more characteristic of informal human-authored educational material than polished AI-generated prose. It also reads like an excerpt from a tutorial explaining array axes.

The passage has a polished explanatory style but includes slightly awkward and redundant phrasing, such as “as one might say,” and presents a generic conceptual explanation in a way characteristic of AI-generated instructional text. It is therefore likely AI-generated.

The passage is concise, technical documentation with a direct imperative and a specific explanation of variable masking. Its wording and punctuation feel like naturally authored programming guidance rather than a highly structured or overly polished AI paraphrase.

The passage uses polished, instructional language with an unusual archaic insertion (“pray”) and a somewhat embellished description (“special, magical behavior”). This stylistic combination is characteristic of AI-generated paraphrasing rather than ordinary technical documentation.

The passage uses a straightforward instructional style with a minor subject–verb agreement error (“coordinates ... has”) and references an accompanying picture. These characteristics are more consistent with human-authored explanatory text than polished AI-generated prose.

The passage uses a polished, explanatory style with somewhat unnatural phrasing such as “as one might say, runs to length 3,” which is characteristic of AI-generated instructional paraphrase.
